spec.objective: Extend BuildJobSpec and its callers to perform vendor-aware credential injection. When the resolved vendor is 'openai', the credproxy sidecar is skipped and OPENAI_API_KEY is injected directly from the per-level ProviderSecretRef Secret into the subagent container env — the Codex CLI has no proxy-URL concept, so direct env injection is the documented API-key auth path. When vendor is 'anthropic', the existing credproxy path is unchanged. BuildOptions gains Vendor string and LevelProviderSecretRef string fields; dispatch_helpers.go provides the ResolveProviderSecretRef helper (from plan-01); all four planner-level controllers and the task controller are updated to pass both. Offline unit tests in jobspec_test.go cover the Codex credential branch.
